1.name: Cloak of Shadows
1.description: [1] : Remain hidden so long as you do not move
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Second Edition Pg. 163-164
Vampire: The Dark Ages Rulebook Pg. 154
Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 166

1.name: Cloak of Shadows [1]
1.description: Remain hidden so long as you do not move

1.name: The Silence of Death
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 225

2.name: Unseen Presence
2.description: [2] : Become invisible to others so long as you do not attract attention
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Second Edition Pg. 164
Vampire: The Dark Ages Rulebook Pg. 154
Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 166

2.name: Unseen Presence [2]
2.description: Become invisible to others so long as you do not attract attention

2.name: Vanish
2.description: Requires Cloak of Shadows. The vampire can activate Cloak of Shadows or Unseen Passage even under direct observation.

3.name: Mask of a Thousand Faces
3.description: [3] : Change your appearance and mannerisms to mimic someone else
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages Rulebook Pg. 154
Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 166

3.name: Mask of a Thousand Faces [3]
3.description: Change your appearance and mannerisms to mimic someone else

3.name: Mask of the Thousand Faces
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Second Edition Pg. 164

3.name: Mental Maze
3.description: Make someone unable to find their way out of an area
references: Vampire: The Masquerade, Cults Of The Blood Gods Pg. 85
Clanbook: Followers of Set Revised Pg. 67

4.name: Unseen Presence
4.description: [2] : Become invisible to others so long as you do not attract attention
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Second Edition Pg. 164
Vampire: The Dark Ages Rulebook Pg. 154
Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 166

4.name: Vanish from Mind's Eye
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Second Edition Pg. 164

4.name: Vanish from the Mind's Eye
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages Rulebook Pg. 155
Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 167

4.name: Vanish/Fade from the Mind's Eye [4]
4.description: Disappear right from in front of someone

5.name: Cloak the Gathering
5.description: [5] : Extend your Obfuscate powers to a group
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Second Edition Pg. 164
Vampire: The Dark Ages Rulebook Pg. 155
Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 167

5.name: Cloak the Gathering [5]
5.description: Extend your Obfuscate powers to a group

6.name: [6] Blithe Acceptance
6.description: People nearby will ignore you no matter what you do so long as you do not become violent Busy Doing Nothing : Makes you appear to be doing nothing Conceal : Hide an object independent of you up to the size of a house Confusion of the Eye : Make a target mentally view someone else differently as with Mask of a Thousand Faces without making any visible signs to others Diastasis: Lets the user fade away and replace themselves with an illusionary self they can control Displacement : Appear to be shifted a little to one side Gemini's Mirror : Move around invisible while an image of you continues to act normally Invisible Weapon : Hide a weapon so that it cannot be seen even when you are attacking with it Manifold Guise : Make everyone in an area look like someone else as with Mask of a Thousand Faces , whether they want to or not Mask of Janus : Exchange your appearance as with Mask of a Thousand Faces with someone else Mask The Devil : Blank your aura and become immune to all powers affecting your beast Mental Maze : Make someone unable to find their way out of an area Mind Blank : Protect your mind from attempts to read it Scrawl : Hide messages in writing legible only to an intended viewer Soul Mask : Disguise your aura to appear differently or not at all

6.name: Blithe Acceptance
6.description: ance : People nearby will ignore you no matter what you do so long as you do not become violent Busy Doing Nothing : Makes you appear to be doing nothing Conceal : Hide an object independent of you up to the size of a house Confusion of the Eye : Make a target mentally view someone else differently as with Mask of a Thousand Faces without making any visible signs to others Diastasis: Lets the user fade away and replace themselves with an illusionary self they can control Displacement : Appear to be shifted a little to one side Gemini's Mirror : Move around invisible while an image of you continues to act normally Invisible Weapon : Hide a weapon so that it cannot be seen even when you are attacking with it Manifold Guise : Make everyone in an area look like someone else as with Mask of a Thousand Faces , whether they want to or not Mask of Janus : Exchange your appearance as with Mask of a Thousand Faces with someone else Mask The Devil : Blank your aura and become immune to all powers affecting your beast Mental Maze : Make someone unable to find their way out of an area Mind Blank : Protect your mind from attempts to read it Scrawl : Hide messages in writing legible only to an intended viewer Soul Mask : Disguise your aura to appear differently or not at all

6.name: Busy Doing Nothing
6.description: Makes you appear to be doing nothing

6.name: Conceal
6.description: Hide an object independent of you up to the size of a house
references: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 76

6.name: Confusion of the Eye
6.description: Make a target mentally view someone else differently as with Mask of a Thousand Faces without making any visible signs to others
references: Clanbook: Followers of Set Revised Pg. 68

6.name: Diastasis
6.description: Lets the user fade away and replace themselves with an illusionary self they can control

6.name: Displacement
6.description: Appear to be shifted a little to one side

6.name: Gemini's Mirror
6.description: Move around invisible while an image of you continues to act normally

6.name: Invisible Weapon
6.description: Hide a weapon so that it cannot be seen even when you are attacking with it
references: Players Guide to Low Clans Pg. 150

6.name: Manifold Guise
6.description: Make everyone in an area look like someone else as with Mask of a Thousand Faces , whether they want to or not
references: Libellus Sanguinis 4: Thieves in the Night Pg. 77

6.name: Mask of Janus
6.description: Exchange your appearance as with Mask of a Thousand Faces with someone else

6.name: Mask the Devil
6.description: Blank your aura and become immune to all powers affecting your beast
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 227

6.name: Mental Maze
6.description: Make someone unable to find their way out of an area
references: Vampire: The Masquerade, Cults Of The Blood Gods Pg. 85
Clanbook: Followers of Set Revised Pg. 67

6.name: Mind Blank
6.description: Protect your mind from attempts to read it
references: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 76

6.name: Scrawl
6.description: Hide messages in writing legible only to an intended viewer

6.name: Soul Mask
6.description: Disguise your aura to appear differently or not at all
references: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 76
Vampire: The Dark Ages Rulebook Pg. 155

7.name: [7] Cache
7.description: Extend an Obfuscate power so that it continues after you have left the area Cloak : Hide yourself from Auspex powers searching for you Fortress of Silence : Cut any noises off, allowing clarity of thought and heightened awareness of self, or use on a target to drive it mad with the sound of its own heartbeat Veil of Blissful Ignorance : Make it so no one will see a person no matter what he does Veil the Legions : Hide a small army from a distance Visit Faerieland : Step into the Dream

7.name: Cache
7.description: ache : Extend an Obfuscate power so that it continues after you have left the area Cloak : Hide yourself from Auspex powers searching for you Fortress of Silence : Cut any noises off, allowing clarity of thought and heightened awareness of self, or use on a target to drive it mad with the sound of its own heartbeat Veil of Blissful Ignorance : Make it so no one will see a person no matter what he does Veil the Legions : Hide a small army from a distance Visit Faerieland : Step into the Dream
references: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 77

7.name: Cloak
7.description: Hide yourself from Auspex powers searching for you
references: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 77

7.name: Fortress of Silence
7.description: Cut any noises off, allowing clarity of thought and heightened awareness of self, or use on a target to drive it mad with the sound of its own heartbeat
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 227

7.name: Veil of Blissful Ignorance
7.description: Make it so no one will see a person no matter what he does
references: Players Guide to Low Clans Pg. 150

7.name: Veil the Legions
7.description: Hide a small army from a distance

8.name: [8] Horrid Countenance
8.description: Take on the appearance of a monstrous entity that every person sees as their personal nightmare Old Friend : Make someone view you as a trusted friend and confidant Phantom Haunter : Take on the visage of a figure that haunts and terrifies the target

9.name: [9] Create Name
9.description: Create a whole new identity for yourself that overcomes any suspicions Obscure God's Creation : Remove a person or object from another's perceptions
